title: centella graminifolia
intro: Centella graminifolia, also known as Indian pennywort, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting wound healing. Centella graminifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, making it easily accessible for those seeking its potential health benefits.
